title: NvmMetadata::label_str: use split on null rather than position+match
description: NvmMetadata::label_str (nvm.rs:63) uses a match on position(|&b| b == 0) to trim trailing nulls, then calls from_utf8. This can be written more directly as: let trimmed = self.label.split(|&b| b == 0).next().unwrap_or(&[]); core::str::from_utf8(trimmed).ok(). The split form makes the intent ('take bytes up to the first null') immediately clear without the match arm.
